tagline: Technology-enabled waste services franchise combining on-demand junk removal with multi-year valet trash contracts in a recession-resistant essential services market.
description_short: AWS runs a dual-revenue model pairing on-demand junk removal (Junk Shot) with 3-5 year contracted valet trash service (DoorStep Details) for multifamily property managers. Owners enter full-time as executive operators building B2B relationships, with a patented app and centralized CARE center handling lead capture and routing. The model is designed to scale into a manager-led structure as recurring revenue and operational systems mature.
market_intelligence_insight: Junk removal franchise market hit $5.5B in 2024 and is projected to reach $9.1B by 2033 at a 5.5% CAGR; broader U.S. waste collection services industry is $86.1B in 2026 growing at 3.1% annually; valet trash remains significantly underpenetrated with only 1.5M of 20M+ U.S. apartment units currently served.
item_19_headline: Single-territory franchisees open at least one year report median combined gross revenue of $334,760.
ongoing_support: field support visits,operations manual updates,phone and email support,national conferences,technology platform,CARE center call handling
